reasoning: The early access launch on March 5, 2026, saw a massive influx of reviews. While English reviews (and many other languages) are 'Overwhelmingly Positive' (>=95%), there is a massive block of over 36,000 Simplified Chinese reviews sitting at 'Mixed' (typically 40-69% positive). With over 10,000 negative Chinese reviews out of ~80,000 total global reviews, it is mathematically impossible for the global 'All Languages' overall score to be >=95%, as that would require max ~4,000 negative reviews globally. Unless Valve intervenes to mark the Chinese reviews as 'off-topic review activity' (which usually only happens for external controversies, not typical bad localization/server issues) or the market creator resolves based on the English-only filtered score, the resolution will be NO. I estimate a 4% chance of these exceptions occurring.
